member.name: T:PhoneStoreApi.Controllers.ProductsController
member.summary: Manage phone products in the store inventory.

member.name: M:PhoneStoreApi.Controllers.ProductsController.GetProducts
member.remarks: Returns the full list of phones in the inventory.

member.name: M:PhoneStoreApi.Controllers.ProductsController.AddProduct(PhoneStoreApi.Models.Product)
member.remarks: Creates a new phone entry in the inventory.
